name: The Kitchen Homemade Korean Restaurant
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Asian Restaurant > Korean Restaurant
description: A cozy neighborhood Korean restaurant on Sasamat Street known for comfort homestyle dishes like Korean fried chicken, bibimbap, and soft tofu soup. Friendly staff and a welcoming atmosphere make it a local favorite.

name: Melriches Coffee House
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Café
description: A charming independent coffeehouse on Davie Street with a cozy, homey vibe. Known for fresh-baked cinnamon buns, cheesecake, and brewed coffee. A popular local spot for people-watching and getting work done.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 6:30 AM – 6:00 PM; Tue 6:30 AM – 6:00 PM; Wed 6:30 AM – 6:00 PM; Thu 6:30 AM – 6:00 PM; Fri 6:30 AM – 6:00 PM; Sat 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM; Sun 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM

name: Taco Time
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Mexican Restaurant > Taco Restaurant
description: Taco Time is a restaurant spot at 655 Burrard.

metadata.note: Taco Time at 655 Burrard is permanently closed on Google Maps. Last rating 3.7 with 12 reviews.

name: Waves Coffee House
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Coffee Shop
description: A spacious downtown Vancouver location of the popular Waves Coffee chain. Features meeting rooms, friendly baristas, and a wide selection of coffee, tea lattes, and pastries. A go-to spot for remote work and casual meetups.

metadata.note: No Waves Coffee at exact address 1198 W Pender St. Matched to nearest location: Waves Coffee House - Howe at 900 Howe St #100.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Tue 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Wed 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Thu 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Fri 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Sat 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Sun 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM

name: Bowltiful Chinese Cuisine
address: 1820 Marine Dr, West Vancouver, BC V7V 4W4
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Asian Restaurant > Chinese Restaurant
description: A highly-rated Mandarin-style Chinese restaurant in West Vancouver known for authentic Sichuan and Chongqing noodles, spicy boiled fish, and generous portions with free noodle refills. A casual, welcoming spot popular with families and solo diners alike.

schedule.openingHours: Mon Closed; Tue 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Wed 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Thu 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Fri 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Sat 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Sun 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM

name: Taf's Cafe
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Coffee Shop
description: A funky, bohemian-style Mediterranean cafe on Granville Street with eclectic local art and a cozy, laid-back vibe. Known for affordable pasta, sangria, beer, and being a great people-watching spot in downtown Vancouver.

name: Brazza Gelato & Coffee
address: 1846 Lonsdale Ave, North Vancouver, BC V7M 2J9
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Dessert Shop > Ice Cream Parlor
description: A cozy gelato and coffee cafe on Lonsdale Avenue in North Vancouver, known for its artisan gelato (including Persian-inspired flavors), quality espresso drinks, and a friendly neighborhood atmosphere. A great spot for working on a laptop or a casual afternoon treat.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Tue 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Wed 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Thu 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Sat 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; Sun 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

name: Donair Town
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Falafel Restaurant
description: A casual kebab and donair shop near UBC campus, offering healthy options, quick bites, and small plates. Popular for solo dining with friendly lunch and dinner service.

name: Uva Wine & Cocktail Bar / Cibo Trattoria
nameKr: 우바 와인 앤 칵테일 바 / 치보 트라토리아
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Italian Restaurant
description: A stylish wine and cocktail bar in the Moda Hotel that transforms from a bright breakfast and lunch spot into a swanky lounge with handcrafted cocktails by night. Known for great cocktails, wine list, and live performances.
nameEn: Uva Wine & Cocktail Bar / Cibo Trattoria

name: Body Energy Club
address: 1131 W Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6E 4M3
description: A popular juice and smoothie bar located inside Equinox fitness club on West Georgia Street. Known for fresh smoothies, acai bowls, and healthy supplements with friendly and knowledgeable staff.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM; Tue 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM; Wed 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM; Thu 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM; Fri 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM; Sat 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Sun 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM

name: Tim Hortons
address: 5965 Student Union Blvd, Vancouver, BC V6T 1K2
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Coffee Shop
description: A Canadian chain coffee shop on UBC campus known for signature premium-blend coffee, light fare, pastries, and breakfast sandwiches. Popular with university students for quick coffee and study breaks.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Tue 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Wed 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Thu 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Fri 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Sat 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM; Sun 7:00 AM – 7:00 PM

name: The Frying Pan
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Fried Chicken Joint
description: A popular fried chicken food truck in downtown Vancouver known for crispy, juicy Korean-style fried chicken sandwiches, waffle fries, and spicy options. Friendly staff and quick service make it a lunchtime favorite.

metadata.note: Listed as 'The Frying Pan' at 60 West Cordova, but matched to 'Frying Pan food truck' at 505 Burrard St. No exact match at the original address.

schedule.openingHours: Mon Closed; Tue 11:00 AM – 2:30 PM; Wed 11:00 AM – 2:30 PM; Thu 11:00 AM – 2:30 PM; Fri 11:00 AM – 2:30 PM; Sat Closed; Sun Closed

name: Queensboro Pizza
description: Neighborhood pizzeria in Queensborough, New Westminster offering affordable pizza by the slice and full pies with a variety of toppings including tandoori chicken, butter chicken, and classic options. Known for friendly service and great value.

name: Commissary Connect
description: Shared-use commercial kitchen facility in Vancouver's industrial district. A hub for food entrepreneurs and startups, offering clean kitchen space, walk-in fridges, and supportive staff. Home to multiple food businesses including bakeries and momo vendors.

metadata.note: Shared-use commercial kitchen, not a traditional restaurant

schedule.openingHours: Mon Open 24 hours; Tue Open 24 hours; Wed Open 24 hours; Thu Open 24 hours; Fri Open 24 hours; Sat Open 24 hours; Sun Open 24 hours

name: Anna's Cake House
description: Long-established Chinese bakery in Vancouver since the mid-1970s, renowned for specialty cakes including chestnut cake and fresh mango cake. Also offers egg tarts, cream puffs, buns, and savory items like chicken pot pie and curry beef pie. A nostalgic neighborhood bakery destination.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Tue 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Wed 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Thu 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Fri 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Sat 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM; Sun 9:30 AM - 6:00 PM

name: BT Cafe
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Asian Restaurant > Chinese Restaurant
description: Hong Kong-style Cantonese cafe (cha chaan teng) on Kingsway known for classic comfort dishes like baked rice with tomato sauce, French toast, milk tea, and beef chow fun. A beloved hidden gem with a mom-and-pop atmosphere. Cash only.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Tue Closed; Wed 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Thu 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Fri 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Sat 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Sun 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM

name: Van Cha 温茶里
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Tea Room
description: Cozy downtown teahouse offering premium traditional Chinese leaf tea tastings including black tea, white tea, oolong, and Pu-erh. Features an authentic tea master, calming minimalist setting, handcrafted incense, and tea accessories. A peaceful retreat from the busy city for both tea newcomers and aficionados.

name: Le Pho Vietnamese Cuisine
category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Asian Restaurant > Vietnamese Restaurant
description: Basic strip-mall Vietnamese cafe in East Vancouver offering traditional fare including pho, banh mi, spring rolls, deep fried chicken wings, and hot and sour soup. A family-run establishment known for reliable comfort food at great value. Closed on Tuesdays.

schedule.openingHours: Mon 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Tue Closed; Wed 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Thu 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Fri 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Sat 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM; Sun 11:00 AM - 8:00 PM

description: Canadian specialty coffee chain known for premium hand-crafted beverages with cozy neighbourhood vibes, free Wi-Fi, and welcoming atmosphere for remote work and casual meetings.
_fsq_category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Coffee Shop
_enrichment_note: Exact 508 W Hastings location not found on Google Maps; enriched with chain data from nearest Blenz Coffee (935 Denman St) which had the most reviews.

description: Canadian chain for signature premium-blend coffee, plus light fare, pastries and breakfast sandwiches, located in Il Mercato on Commercial Drive with dine-in, takeout, and delivery options.
_fsq_category_label: Dining and Drinking > Cafe, Coffee, and Tea House > Coffee Shop

description: Intimate upscale Japanese kaiseki and omakase restaurant in Steveston, Richmond, offering multi-course seasonal menus featuring premium sashimi, A5 wagyu, uni, and traditional chawanmushi, with reservation-only seating for a minimum of two guests.
_fsq_category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Asian Restaurant > Japanese Restaurant > Sushi Restaurant
_enrichment_note: Listed as 'Kuroki Kaiseki Omakase Kitchen 黑木関西会席料理' on Google Maps. Original FSQ name had 'Sashimi Omalase' which appears to be a typo. Actual price is $100+ ($$$$), not $$ as in source data. Reservation only, min 2 people.

description: Industrial-style speakeasy in Chinatown specializing in dumplings and cocktails with a laid-back atmosphere. Disguised as a dumpling shop, ordering the secret menu item reveals a swanky cocktail bar within.
address: 251 E Georgia St, Vancouver, BC V6A 4J7

description: Popular halal restaurant in Richmond offering generous portions of shawarma, falafel, and other Middle Eastern dishes at affordable prices. Known for flavorful chicken shawarma platters and a loyal local following.
_fsq_category_label: Dining and Drinking > Restaurant > Mediterranean Restaurant
